---
title: "Physical Geography"
subtitle: "Comprehensive study of geomorphology, climatology, and oceanography."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include physical-geography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

## Geomorphology

{{< include geomorphology/01-fundamental-concepts-of-geomorphology.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/02-factors-controlling-landform-development.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/03-endogenetic-and-exogenetic-forces.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/04-denudation-processes.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/05-continental-drift-and-plate-tectonics.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/06-geomorphic-cycle.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/07-landforms-fluvial.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/08-landforms-glacial.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/09-slope-forms-and-processes.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/10-coastal-landforms.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/11-karst-landforms.md >}}
{{< include geomorphology/12-aeolian-landforms.md >}}

---

## Climatology

{{< include climatology/01-atmosphere-composition-structure.md >}}
{{< include climatology/02-insolation-and-heat-budget.md >}}
{{< include climatology/03-temperature-distribution.md >}}
{{< include climatology/04-atmospheric-pressure-and-circulation.md >}}
{{< include climatology/05-monsoons-and-jet-streams.md >}}
{{< include climatology/06-air-masses-and-fronts.md >}}
{{< include climatology/07-cyclones.md >}}
{{< include climatology/08-precipitation.md >}}
{{< include climatology/09-climate-classification.md >}}

---

## Oceanography

{{< include oceanography/01-origin-of-ocean-basins.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/02-ocean-floor-relief.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/03-temperature-salinity-density.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/04-waves-tides-currents.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/05-sea-level-changes.md >}}
{{< include oceanography/06-coral-reefs.md >}}
